creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Dakotah Lambert from comment #0)

I'm sorry for the lack of action here. 

The corresponding .patch file (comment 1) no longer applies, would you be willing to make revisions? 

Thank you

----

% git -C /usr/src pull --ff-only freebsd main
From https://git.freebsd.org/src
 * branch                      main       -> FETCH_HEAD
Already up to date.
